query:
SELECT 
  p.name, 
  p.tags,
  m.research_field_name,
  u.research_field_name as uw_field,
  u.image_url as uw_image
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN research_field_tag_mapping m ON JSON_CONTAINS(p.tags, JSON_QUOTE(m.tag_name))
LEFT JOIN university_field_images u ON u.research_field_name = m.research_field_name AND u.university_name = 'University of Washington'
WHERE p.name = 'Nam-Joo Cin'
LIMIT 10;
